TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Fatad kanatal == Fatad kanatal (Inkiris: Midway Atoll, sasowalan: Midway Islands, Hawaii: Pihemanu), sasifo'ay no Taypinyang a kanatal, saheto o nano karat, o hetal salongan ira ko 6.2 kongli. Sahetoay o karakaratan ko Fatad kanatal, halo ta'angay tafokan kanatal ato ka'emingay kawaliay kanatal . Kaetip ka'amisan no Honolulu to 2,100 kongli, o nano Polynesia. Nawhan i saka 2 lalood no hekal no Amilika ato Dipong lalood ko sakacingangan nonini Fatad kanatal itiya. Likisi I 1859 miheca masapinang no Amilika konini Fatad kanatal, calapan no Amilika i 1867 miheca, 1903 miheca miteka ko riyaray sofitay no Amilika a mikowan, i 1905 mihea patireng to lalinikay no riyar a calay kalalicayan, i 1939 miheca kalo pacarcaran no hikoki ato matenengay tamina koni. saka tadamaanay kaheceraan riyaray sofitay no Amilika itiya. Tona matapi' ko pihokhok milood to Pearl (odo'/cinco) minato i 1941 miheca 12 folad 7 romi'ad o riyaray sofitay no Dipong to ikor i, o riyaray sofitay no Dipong i 1942 miheca 6 folad 4 romi'ad milood to Fatad kanatal, nika cinipatalaay to ko Amilika itiya, malaom ko Dipong to 4 inaay tamina a mateneng, nanoyaan awaay to ko 'icel sakalalood i Taypinyang, pafeli o hananay to ko Amilika. O tadamaanay kaitiraan no sofitay ko Fatad kanatal imatini. O fa'edetay romi'ad, rafas to 1,000 kongli ko orad to mihecaan, o pacarcaran no 'ayam no riyar, kasadakan no fafoy no riyar ko taliyok, mapatireng ko pidipotan to 'ayam itira. Kinacecay mipasadak to mihecaan, piharatengan to mapatayay sofitay itiya ho. I 2011 miheca 3 folad 11 romi'ad, tona ira i kawali ka'amisan a Taypinyang no Dipong to tangasaay MW9.1 a lonen . Oyana lonen ira ko takaraway 40.1 salitek no rangod, onini a rangod tayni i Fatad kanatal tangsa 1.5 salitek ko takaraw. Manaop no rangod ko kawaliay a kanatal maemin, salongan 60% ko marafanaway itiya. Oya itiraay i karat a noriyar a 'ayam salongan 1,000 ato romaroma a 'ayam maemin manaop no rangod a mapatay . Pala ato sera Romi'ad Talacowa ono ka'amisan a calay ko kaitiraan no Fatad kanatal, nika o so'emetay mafail ko romi'ad . Matatodong ko kaciorad to mihecaan no Fatad kanatal, tosaay folad (saka 5 ato 6 folad) ko kakedalan romi'ad no miheca. Sakaira no pakayraan :kaetipay sa'etal romi'ad citodongay Pinengnengan Lalood i Taypinyang Lalood i Fatad kanatal Kalaloodan i Fatad kanatal Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ == fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ (inkiris: miɬ~ɮwaj ato~uɾɾ, saso~uwaɾan: miɬ~ɮwaj isɾanɬ~ɮs, ħawaii: piħəmano~u~u), sasifo~uʡaj no~u tajpinjaŋ a kanataɾ, saħəto~u o~u nano~u karat, o~u ħətaɾ saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u *.* ko~uŋɾi. saħəto~uaj o~u karakaratan ko~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, ħaɾo~u taʡaŋaj tafo~ukan kanataɾ ato~u kaʡəmiŋaj kawaɾiaj kanataɾ . kaətip kaʡamisan no~u ħo~uno~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u to~u *,*** ko~uŋɾi, o~u nano~u po~uɾjnəsia. nawħan i saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ no~u amiɾika ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u sakaʦiŋaŋan no~unini fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ itija. ɾikisi i **** miħəʦa masapinaŋ no~u amiɾika ko~unini fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, ʦaɾapan no~u amiɾika i **** miħəʦa, **** miħəʦa mitəka ko~u rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika a miko~uwan, i **** miħəa patirəŋ to~u ɾaɾinikaj no~u rijar a ʦaɾaj kaɾaɾiʦajan, i **** miħəʦa kaɾo~u paʦarʦaran no~u ħiko~uki ato~u matənəŋaj tamina ko~uni. saka taɬ~ɮamaanaj kaħəʦəraan rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika itija. to~una matapiʡ ko~u piħo~ukħo~uk miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pəarɾ (o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ/ʦinʦo~u) minato~u i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u iko~ur i, o~u rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, nika ʦinipataɾaaj to~u ko~u amiɾika itija, maɾao~um ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u * inaaj tamina a matənəŋ, nano~ujaan awaaj to~u ko~u ʡiʦəɾ sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajpinjaŋ, pafəɾi o~u ħananaj to~u ko~u amiɾika. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kaitiraan no~u so~ufitaj ko~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ imatini. o~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, rafas to~u *,*** ko~uŋɾi ko~u o~uraɬ~ɮ to~u miħəʦaan, o~u paʦarʦaran no~u ʡajam no~u rijar, kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u fafo~uj no~u rijar ko~u taɾijo~uk, mapatirəŋ ko~u piɬ~ɮipo~utan to~u ʡajam itira. kinaʦəʦaj mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u miħəʦaan, piħaratəŋan to~u mapatajaj so~ufitaj itija ħo~u. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~una ira i kawaɾi kaʡamisan a tajpinjaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u taŋasaaj mw*.* a ɾo~unən . o~ujana ɾo~unən ira ko~u takarawaj **.* saɾitək no~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ, o~unini a raŋo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ taŋsa *.* saɾitək ko~u takaraw. manao~up no~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kawaɾiaj a kanataɾ maəmin, saɾo~uŋan **% ko~u marafanawaj itija. o~uja itiraaj i karat a no~urijar a ʡajam saɾo~uŋan *,*** ato~u ro~umaro~uma a ʡajam maəmin manao~up no~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ a mapataj . paɾa ato~u səra ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taɾaʦo~uwa o~uno~u kaʡamisan a ʦaɾaj ko~u kaitiraan no~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, nika o~u so~uʡəmətaj mafaiɾ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ . matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u kaʦio~uraɬ~ɮ to~u miħəʦaan no~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, to~usaaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ (saka * ato~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ) ko~u kakəɬ~ɮaɾan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u miħəʦa. sakaira no~u pakajraan :kaətipaj saʡətaɾ ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj pinəŋnəŋan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajpinjaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: == Fatad kanatal == Fatad kanatal (Inkiris: Midway Atoll, sasowalan: Midway Islands, Hawaii: Pihemanu), sasifo'ay no Taypinyang a kanatal, saheto o nano karat, o hetal salongan ira ko 6.2 kongli. Sahetoay o karakaratan ko Fatad kanatal, halo ta'angay tafokan kanatal ato ka'emingay kawaliay kanatal . Kaetip ka'amisan no Honolulu to 2,100 kongli, o nano Polynesia. Nawhan i saka 2 lalood no hekal no Amilika ato Dipong lalood ko sakacingangan nonini Fatad kanatal itiya. Likisi I 1859 miheca masapinang no Amilika konini Fatad kanatal, calapan no Amilika i 1867 miheca, 1903 miheca miteka ko riyaray sofitay no Amilika a mikowan, i 1905 mihea patireng to lalinikay no riyar a calay kalalicayan, i 1939 miheca kalo pacarcaran no hikoki ato matenengay tamina koni. saka tadamaanay kaheceraan riyaray sofitay no Amilika itiya. Tona matapi' ko pihokhok milood to Pearl (odo'/cinco) minato i 1941 miheca 12 folad 7 romi'ad o riyaray sofitay no Dipong to ikor i, o riyaray sofitay no Dipong i 1942 miheca 6 folad 4 romi'ad milood to Fatad kanatal, nika cinipatalaay to ko Amilika itiya, malaom ko Dipong to 4 inaay tamina a mateneng, nanoyaan awaay to ko 'icel sakalalood i Taypinyang, pafeli o hananay to ko Amilika. O tadamaanay kaitiraan no sofitay ko Fatad kanatal imatini. O fa'edetay romi'ad, rafas to 1,000 kongli ko orad to mihecaan, o pacarcaran no 'ayam no riyar, kasadakan no fafoy no riyar ko taliyok, mapatireng ko pidipotan to 'ayam itira. Kinacecay mipasadak to mihecaan, piharatengan to mapatayay sofitay itiya ho. I 2011 miheca 3 folad 11 romi'ad, tona ira i kawali ka'amisan a Taypinyang no Dipong to tangasaay MW9.1 a lonen . Oyana lonen ira ko takaraway 40.1 salitek no rangod, onini a rangod tayni i Fatad kanatal tangsa 1.5 salitek ko takaraw. Manaop no rangod ko kawaliay a kanatal maemin, salongan 60% ko marafanaway itiya. Oya itiraay i karat a noriyar a 'ayam salongan 1,000 ato romaroma a 'ayam maemin manaop no rangod a mapatay . Pala ato sera Romi'ad Talacowa ono ka'amisan a calay ko kaitiraan no Fatad kanatal, nika o so'emetay mafail ko romi'ad . Matatodong ko kaciorad to mihecaan no Fatad kanatal, tosaay folad (saka 5 ato 6 folad) ko kakedalan romi'ad no miheca. Sakaira no pakayraan :kaetipay sa'etal romi'ad citodongay Pinengnengan Lalood i Taypinyang Lalood i Fatad kanatal Kalaloodan i Fatad kanatal Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ == fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ (inkiris: miɬ~ɮwaj ato~uɾɾ, saso~uwaɾan: miɬ~ɮwaj isɾanɬ~ɮs, ħawaii: piħəmano~u~u), sasifo~uʡaj no~u tajpinjaŋ a kanataɾ, saħəto~u o~u nano~u karat, o~u ħətaɾ saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u *.* ko~uŋɾi. saħəto~uaj o~u karakaratan ko~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, ħaɾo~u taʡaŋaj tafo~ukan kanataɾ ato~u kaʡəmiŋaj kawaɾiaj kanataɾ . kaətip kaʡamisan no~u ħo~uno~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u to~u *,*** ko~uŋɾi, o~u nano~u po~uɾjnəsia. nawħan i saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ no~u amiɾika ato~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u sakaʦiŋaŋan no~unini fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ itija. ɾikisi i **** miħəʦa masapinaŋ no~u amiɾika ko~unini fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, ʦaɾapan no~u amiɾika i **** miħəʦa, **** miħəʦa mitəka ko~u rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika a miko~uwan, i **** miħəa patirəŋ to~u ɾaɾinikaj no~u rijar a ʦaɾaj kaɾaɾiʦajan, i **** miħəʦa kaɾo~u paʦarʦaran no~u ħiko~uki ato~u matənəŋaj tamina ko~uni. saka taɬ~ɮamaanaj kaħəʦəraan rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika itija. to~una matapiʡ ko~u piħo~ukħo~uk miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u pəarɾ (o~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ/ʦinʦo~u) minato~u i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u iko~ur i, o~u rijaraj so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, nika ʦinipataɾaaj to~u ko~u amiɾika itija, maɾao~um ko~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u * inaaj tamina a matənəŋ, nano~ujaan awaaj to~u ko~u ʡiʦəɾ sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajpinjaŋ, pafəɾi o~u ħananaj to~u ko~u amiɾika. o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kaitiraan no~u so~ufitaj ko~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ imatini. o~u faʡəɬ~ɮətaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, rafas to~u *,*** ko~uŋɾi ko~u o~uraɬ~ɮ to~u miħəʦaan, o~u paʦarʦaran no~u ʡajam no~u rijar, kasaɬ~ɮakan no~u fafo~uj no~u rijar ko~u taɾijo~uk, mapatirəŋ ko~u piɬ~ɮipo~utan to~u ʡajam itira. kinaʦəʦaj mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u miħəʦaan, piħaratəŋan to~u mapatajaj so~ufitaj itija ħo~u. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, to~una ira i kawaɾi kaʡamisan a tajpinjaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u taŋasaaj mw*.* a ɾo~unən . o~ujana ɾo~unən ira ko~u takarawaj **.* saɾitək no~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ, o~unini a raŋo~uɬ~ɮ tajni i fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ taŋsa *.* saɾitək ko~u takaraw. manao~up no~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kawaɾiaj a kanataɾ maəmin, saɾo~uŋan **% ko~u marafanawaj itija. o~uja itiraaj i karat a no~urijar a ʡajam saɾo~uŋan *,*** ato~u ro~umaro~uma a ʡajam maəmin manao~up no~u raŋo~uɬ~ɮ a mapataj . paɾa ato~u səra ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taɾaʦo~uwa o~uno~u kaʡamisan a ʦaɾaj ko~u kaitiraan no~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, nika o~u so~uʡəmətaj mafaiɾ ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ . matato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u kaʦio~uraɬ~ɮ to~u miħəʦaan no~u fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ, to~usaaj fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ (saka * ato~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ) ko~u kakəɬ~ɮaɾan ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u miħəʦa. sakaira no~u pakajraan :kaətipaj saʡətaɾ ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj pinəŋnəŋan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajpinjaŋ ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan i fataɬ~ɮ kanataɾ pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
